# Code RED source/decompiled export
# Source: research/model_resource_extract_outputs/model_extract_report.md
# SHA1: 3f8636b5dbddb8adda8c33604af6af8c00acef0f

# Code RED Model Resource Extract Report

This is a read-only extraction and compression roundtrip research report. It does not rebuild WFT/WEDT structure and does not patch any RPF.

- Candidate resources scanned: 3
- Roundtrip tests passed: 1/1
- Archive/errors: 0

## Resource type counts
- `1`: 1
- `11`: 2

## Hint counts
- `wedt_or_editdata_candidate_type11`: 2
- `fragment_or_drawable_candidate_type1`: 1

## Current boundary

The pass can extract raw and decoded payloads, map virtual pointers, strings, root signatures, and prove zstd decode/recompress/decode equality. It is not yet a semantic WFT/WEDT model compiler. The next safe milestone is a byte-preserving decoded payload rebuilder or same-size texture replacement proof inside a copied RPF.

## Validation note

One decoded type-11 candidate payload was externally recompressed/decompressed with `zstd` and matched the original decoded SHA1. This proves compression roundtrip only; it is not a semantic WFT/WEDT rebuild.
